what: bf16_persist page_size=128 for bs>=64 kv>=4096 only (keep ps=64 for bs<64)
why: ps=128 failed for bs<=32 (v102/v103) due to tolerance, but larger batches have more averaging. bs>=64 untested. Would halve page count for bs=64,256 kv=8k shapes.
override: Prior ps=128 attempts only tested bs<=32 where tolerance fails. This targets bs>=64 only, which has never been tested with ps=128. Larger batches have more KV tokens for averaging, reducing quantization noise per page.
